title: New India Assurance Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: New India Assurance Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
